title: The Boy and the Bath (prototype!)
description: A horror mod about Doctor Nowhere's analog horror creation. Early stages!
body:
This mod aims to bring Guilt from the boy and the bath to Minecraft in a meaningful way, that isn't just a dweller.

If you don't know, the boy and the bath is a short analog horror video, created by doctor nowehere. Even though the video is only like 3 minutes long, it is enough to create a deep story and disturbing atmosphere, which, again, I am attempting to add to minecraft in a meaningful, and hopefully scary way.

It is in it's early stages, so don't worry if it's not that good, I will be updating it! I also havn't playtested it myself, nor have the amount if time needed to do so, which is why I am uploading it in this state, to hopefully get people to playtest it.

Please don't hesitate to provide feedback, critisism, or ideas of what to add, in fact I encourage it.

Go to curseforge to give feedback since there are no comments on Modrinth
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-boy-and-the-bath-prototype

SPOILERS!!!

Currently, Guilt is supposed to watch and track down, and then kill the player, supposed to. Remember it's a work in progress. There are also two other entites, that are just versions of guilt with their only purpose being to stalk and watch the player from afar. There is also a "torture" dimension that you can be randomly teleported to either by just existing, or by sleeping. There are also 3 structures that relate to the story. I have also added a bunch of random events and sound effects to perhaps make the atmosphere seem scarier.
